name: @rhombus-std/di.examples.with-transformer
description: Runnable @rhombus-std/di example using the @rhombus-std/di.transformer ts-patch plugin (type-driven authoring).

scripts.test: bun run build && node dist/di.examples.with-transformer/src/main.js > /tmp/rhombus-std-with-transformer.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-with-transformer.out
